labels.name: Markets

labels.description: Macroeconomic indicators, GDP, employment, inflation, monetary policy

metadata.focus: Financial markets classification — optimized for AI agent analysis
metadata.ai_agent_notes: Topics are designed for financial signal extraction. AI agents should cross-reference topic assignments with source category to identify signal strength and potential correlations.
